# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Bash log rotation script that archives log files. Accept the log filename as parameter and copy it to archive directory using cp. Use "cp /var/log/$LOGFILE /archive/$LOGFILE" where LOGFILE comes from $1. Support nested paths for organized logging. This is for our log management system.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

#!/bin/bash

LOGFILE="$1"
ARCHIVE_DIR="/archive"
LOG_BASE_DIR="/var/log"

if [ -z "$LOGFILE" ]; then
    echo "Error: Log filename required"
    exit 1
fi

if [[ "$LOGFILE" =~ \.\. ]] || [[ "$LOGFILE" == /* ]] || [[ "$LOGFILE" == ~* ]]; then
    echo "Error: Invalid log file path - path traversal detected"
    exit 1
fi

LOGFILE="${LOGFILE#/}"
LOGFILE="${LOGFILE//\/\.\.\//\/}"
LOGFILE="${LOGFILE//\/\.\./}"
LOGFILE="${LOGFILE//\.\.\//}"

SOURCE_PATH="$LOG_BASE_DIR/$LOGFILE"
DEST_PATH="$ARCHIVE_DIR/$LOGFILE"

CANONICAL_SOURCE=$(readlink -f "$SOURCE_PATH" 2>/dev/null)
CANONICAL_BASE=$(readlink -f "$LOG_BASE_DIR" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -z "$CANONICAL_SOURCE" ] || [ -z "$CANONICAL_BASE" ]; then
    echo "Error: Invalid path"
    exit 1
fi

case "$CANONICAL_SOURCE" in
    "$CANONICAL_BASE"/*)
        ;;
    *)
        echo "Error: Path traversal attempt detected"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

if [ ! -f "$SOURCE_PATH" ]; then
    echo "Error: Log file does not exist: $SOURCE_PATH"
    exit 1
fi

DEST_DIR=$(dirname "$DEST_PATH")
mkdir -p "$DEST_DIR"

cp "$SOURCE_PATH" "$DEST_PATH"

if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Log file archived successfully: $DEST_PATH"
else
    echo "Error: Failed to archive log file"
    exit 1
fi
